description_long: This is a black, polygonal barrel or bucket with a wide, slightly flared base and a tapering cylindrical body. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible handles or structural reinforcements. On one side, the words 'DIGITAL' are printed in large, bold, light gray letters arranged diagonally, while the opposite side features the marking 'B&D' in a similar style. The top appears open, suggesting it is a receptacle for holding or collecting materials. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on branding through the prominent text. Its size and shape suggest it could be used for waste collection, storage, or as a decorative urban object.
description: A black, open-topped barrel or bucket with a smooth matte finish and bold gray text markings ('DIGITAL' and 'B&D') on opposite sides. The design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: A front view showing the plain, smooth black surface with no visible markings or features.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the word 'DIGITAL' in large, light gray letters arranged diagonally across the surface.
description_view_2: A rear view similar to the front, showing a plain, unmarked black surface.
description_view_3: A side view featuring the marking 'B&D' in large, light gray letters diagonally across the surface.
